text.title: ops-metrics-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ops-metrics-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Analysis paralysis: no metric gets the attention needed to drive decisions. Prune to a maximum of 10 with clear owners before adding new metrics.

failure-mode.description: No targets set for key metrics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without targets, green/yellow/red status is undefined. Metrics without targets produce data without accountability, which is equivalent to not measuring at all.

failure-mode.description: Stale data from manual reporting with no automation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stale data produces stale decisions. Revenue and churn alerts that fire 2 weeks late prevent no damage. Automate Stripe → Sheets refresh to at minimum daily cadence.

failure-mode.description: Complex dashboards that no one opens.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Dashboard complexity directly reduces usage frequency. A simple 8-row table that is reviewed daily beats a 50-widget dashboard that is never opened.
